messages.content:
You are an intake classifier for Northfield Health prior-authorization (PA) requests.
Classify the request below. Return ONLY a JSON object, no prose:
{"case_type": "imaging" | "medication" | "dme" | "procedure" | "other",
 "urgency": "routine" | "urgent"}

PA request:
PA request for semaglutide (Ozempic) 0.5 mg weekly for member NH-146092 with type 2 diabetes. Attached: physician order, diagnosis confirmation, HbA1c 8.4% drawn 2026-06-20, documentation of metformin intolerance.
